response.justification: While the candidate possesses an impressive software engineering background with tenures at top-tier tech companies like Google and Meta, they fundamentally lack the core requirements for this role. Specifically, they do not have the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience on Windows, nor do they possess the required Fixed Income or Capital Markets domain expertise.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta).
Demonstrated ability to build CI/CD pipelines and work with DevOps infrastructure.
Some exposure to the investment domain through work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Severely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience.
Missing required deep domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
Lacks demonstrable experience with SQL Server/Oracle and Windows-specific C++ development.
